title: Paw Patrol Stationery Advent Calendar Kids Christmas Countdown Gift Calendar Xmas Art & Craft Set, Blue
description: The countdown to Christmas just got even more exciting for Paw Patrol fans with our 24-door advent calendar. Each door will reveal a different stationery surprise. This delightful calendar is perfect for kids who love the heroic pups of Adventure Bay. Each day brings a new surprise, making the countdown to Christmas a memorable experience.
